ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court ordered the estate closed due to lack of assets and terminates the probate administration. All matters are ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Marion Elesanor Chan (pro per) to appear on December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why this estate shouldn't be closed for lack of assets and or failure to administrator the estate. Status on close of estate and Status on filing inventory and appraisal are also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Nov-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Marion E. Chan appearing in person (pro per) (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the size of the estate being under $150,000.00, that it may be possible to file a small estate affidavit if less than $188,000.00, and that Mrs. Chan can sell the 1991 Toyota Corolla to her sister at an agreed price by the siblings. Status hearing on filing of final inventory and appraisal is continued to September 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Jul-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marion Chan in propria persona.

Mrs. Chan stated that she was only able to apply for the bond on Friday, that in the interim someone had been trying to commit identity theft, that there had been 41 fraudulent banking transactions, and that she should have the bond within 10 days. Mrs. Chan also stated that there is no real property, that there are maybe about six accounts, that she has been using the No Lo Press book and taking some estate and trust classes at City College, and that there is a very old used car (1991 Toyota Corolla). The court explained the process and requirement of filing of an inventory and appraisal. Status on filing of the final inventory and appraisal is continued to July 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Marion E. Chan, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Petitioner that she has taken paralegal courses in preparation for her petition and possible appointment as Administrator in this matter. The court confirms with Petitioner that if appointed, she will be expected to do the following: open a separate estate account; keep assets segregated and fully insured; pay valid creditors; and not make any distributions unless ordered by the court. The court confirms that Petitioner attempted to use a small estate affidavit to recover the assets and that she knows what the next steps are if she is appointment today. Petitioner is advised that the court is inclined to order a full bond in the amount of $150,000. Petitioner acknowledges the court's position regarding the bond issue. The court confirms that there are no appearances object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Marion E. Chan is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $150,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-06-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.
